business_question: What is the total active headcount as of end of this month?
metric_kpi: Active HC = COUNT(empid) WHERE empstatus='Active'

business_question: How has headcount trended month-on-month over the last 12 months?
metric_kpi: MoM HC = Active HC(current month) vs Active HC(prior month)

business_question: What is the headcount split by gender across departments?
metric_kpi: Gender ratio = Male HC/Total HC; Female HC/Total HC

business_question: How many employees are in my team right now?
metric_kpi: Manager HC = COUNT(empid) WHERE manager_id=[x] AND empstatus='Active'

business_question: What is the headcount by grade / job level?
metric_kpi: HC by Grade = COUNT(empid) GROUP BY grade|joblevel

business_question: How many new hires joined this month vs last month?
metric_kpi: New Hire Count = COUNT(empid) WHERE newhireflag='Yes'

business_question: What is the headcount by tenure bucket?
metric_kpi: HC by Tenure = COUNT(empid) GROUP BY tenure_bucket

business_question: What is the headcount by employee type (Full Time / Contract)?
metric_kpi: HC by Emp Type = COUNT(empid) GROUP BY employeetype

business_question: How does headcount compare across business groups?
metric_kpi: HC by business = COUNT(empid) GROUP BY lob|businessgroup

business_question: What is the IC vs PM split in my team?
metric_kpi: IC % = COUNT(IC)/Total HC for manager

business_question: What is the overall attrition rate this month / YTD?
metric_kpi: Attrition % = Leavers in period / Avg Active HC in period * 100

business_question: What is the voluntary vs involuntary attrition split?
metric_kpi: Vol % = Vol Leavers/Total Leavers; Invol % = Invol Leavers/Total Leavers

business_question: What are the top reasons employees are leaving?
metric_kpi: Leaver count by final_reason_of_exit

business_question: How many people left my team this month / quarter?
metric_kpi: Team attrition = COUNT(leavers) WHERE manager_id=[x]

business_question: What is the attrition rate by tenure bucket?
metric_kpi: Attrition % by tenure = Leavers in tenure band / HC in tenure band * 100

business_question: What is the attrition rate by grade / job level?
metric_kpi: Attrition % by grade = Leavers in grade / HC in grade * 100

business_question: How does attrition compare across departments?
metric_kpi: Dept attrition % ranked; highlight above/below org average

business_question: What is the attrition trend month-on-month for the last 12 months?
metric_kpi: Rolling 12M attrition = Leavers(last 12M)/Avg HC(last 12M) * 100

business_question: What is the gender-wise attrition rate?
metric_kpi: Gender attrition % = Gender Leavers / Gender HC * 100

business_question: Which employees in my team have resigned but not yet left (notice period)?
metric_kpi: In-notice = empid WHERE resignation_date IS NOT NULL AND lwd > today

business_question: What is the first-year attrition rate (employees leaving within 12 months)?
metric_kpi: 1Y attrition = Leavers with tenure_months<=12 / Total Leavers * 100

business_question: Do exit reasons differ by department or grade?
metric_kpi: Leaver count by exit reason x department/grade

business_question: What is the attrition rate for new hires (joined in last 6 months)?
metric_kpi: New hire attrition = Leavers where tenure_months<=6 / New hires in same period * 100

business_question: What is the performance rating distribution of employees who left?
metric_kpi: Leaver count by emprating

business_question: How long is the average tenure of employees who left?
metric_kpi: Avg tenure of leavers = AVG(tenure_months) WHERE empstatus='Inactive'
